title: Spike: Investigate Claude Process Communication Protocols
description: Research spike to determine optimal communication method with claude CLI subprocesses. Evaluate: stdout/stderr parsing, JSON-RPC over stdio, WebSocket from claude (if supported), file-based IPC. Document findings with recommendations for real-time streaming, error handling, and process lifecycle management.
acceptance_criteria: Document lists all communication methods supported by claude CLI
Each method evaluated for: latency, reliability, parsing complexity
Error scenarios documented: crash, timeout, invalid output
Findings presented in spike-claude-ipc.md in docs folder
agent_output: Spike complete. Recommendation: Use stdin/stdout with --output-format stream-json. See ADR-001 for full technical report including Rust code snippets, data structures, and architecture diagram.
